sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100347" key="sunepifwne/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπι-φωνέω</orth>, <sense id="n100347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">raise a shout of approval together</tr_>, Aristeas <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">235</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">294</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
